name: No-Bake Strawberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
- Filling:
1. Grind nuts finely in a food processor and set aside.
2. Place the dates in a food processor or blender and grind to form a paste. With the motor still running, add the ground nuts and blend until the mixture forms a ball. Press this mixture evenly on the bottom of a lightly oiled 8-inch pie pan. Refrigerate until ready to fill.
3. Toss the strawberries with maple syrup. Spoon into the pie crust. Cover with waxed paper and refrigerate for 1 hour before serving.
